description: "Initiate the beta distribution testing of the release candidate on the given group/track."

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Start beta distribution on the testing group/track"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"patch"}
  path={"/app-versions/{id}/beta-distribution/testing-groups/{group_id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Initiate the beta distribution testing of the release candidate on the given group/track.
